events.text: Assessed the flanged joint with an incomplete bolt pattern as **fail / high risk** — this violates both ASME PCC-1's bolt-up sequence/gasket-compression requirements and B16.5's bolt circle specifications, creating leak/joint-separation risk once pressurized. Written to `/app/answer.json` with corrective actions (complete bolt installation, re-torque in proper star pattern, inspect gasket, re-inspect before closeout).
